title: senecio integerrimus var. lugens
intro: Senecio integerrimus var. lugens, also known as the tall or upright groundsel, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Senecio integerrimus var. lugens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a digestive aid. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and the need for proper dosing.
